description: Node TS library + Go c-archive + C N-API addon (three sibling packages)

notes: Generates projects/libs/<name> (Node TS), projects/libs/<name>-go (Go c-archive), and projects/libs/<name>-native (C N-API binding).
The Node package loads native/<addon_name>.node via createRequire(import.meta.url).
TARGETS use nix_go_carchive for the Go archive and nix_cpp_node_addon for the addon; the planner links the Go archive automatically.
